puzzle.title: The Nation That Challenged the Sacred House
puzzle.intro: In ancient times, a powerful nation decided to attack a sanctuary revered by believers. This group was wealthy, mighty, and confident in their military strength. They brought with them a massive creature that would serve as their weapon of war. Their goal was clear: to demolish the sacred house and crush the faith of its people. But their arrogance was about to meet a devastating response from above. This historical event became a sign and a lesson for all who came after. Can you identify this group from the clues?
clues: We were a nation blessed with wealth and military prowess.
We gathered our forces and brought a massive beast to use in our campaign.
Our target was a sacred sanctuary that we wished to destroy completely.
We believed our strength would be enough to overcome any divine protection.
But the Lord sent upon us a punishment from the sky we did not expect.
We were destroyed in an instant, scattered like broken straw.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: The People of the Elephant
The People of Thamud
The People of 'Ad
The Companions of the Cave
The Nation of Prophet Hud

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Marching an elephant towards the sacred house to destroy it
Building a tower to reach the heavens
Constructing a golden idol for worship
Refusing to listen to Allah's messenger
Digging a well to harm believers
trial.answer: Marching an elephant towards the sacred house to destroy it

location.label: Key Element
options: The Elephant
The Golden Calf
The Staff of Musa
The Fish of Yunus
The Iron of Dawud

outcome.label: Outcome
options: They were destroyed by flocks of birds with stones
They were drowned in a great flood
They were transformed into apes and pigs
They were buried under falling stones from a mountain
They were burned by fire from the sky
outcome.answer: They were destroyed by flocks of birds with stones
